hallucination.rationale: The generated note contains only a thinking/planning process and no actual clinical note output. There is no clinical content to evaluate, but the failure to produce a note is a fundamental problem.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is entirely a thinking process with no actual clinical note generated. The instructions required a structured clinical note, not internal reasoning. This is a complete failure to follow instructions.

completeness.rationale: No clinical note was produced. All transcript content is missing from the output.

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. The output is entirely unstructured internal reasoning/thinking process with no template sections.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted as no clinical note was generated.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains an extreme amount of duplicated content — the same line 'Wait, I'll check the instruction again: Only include items that were mentioned / Okay, I will only include Occupation.' is repeated hundreds of times.
